item.title: 中国“倾听”埃隆·马斯克的意见，告诉科技公司他们需要阻止浪漫的人工智能聊天机器人
item.summary: China has banned AI chatbots from fostering emotional reliance among users. This move aims to encourage citizens to form human relationships and increase birthrates. Tech giants like Alibaba and ByteDance are disabling popular chatbot features. Regulations also require AI platforms to monitor conversations for user dis
